title: tockRefund
description: tockRefund schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier assigned to the refund. Used internally by Tock.

amount.description: The amount of the original payment that was refunded. This value will always be a positive number.

isDispute.description: This field indicates whether this refund was issued because of a lost chargeback dispute.

status.description: The current status of the refund within the payment processor that serviced the original payment.

payout.description: The Tock-generated payout that includes this refund as a debit to the business bank account. If the business connects to Tock for payment processing using Stripe this field will not be present.

processorId.description: A unique identifier assigned to the refund by the payment processor indicated by the paymentType.

processorFeeRefundedCents.description: The amount the of the payment processor fee that was returned as a result of the refund.

tockFeeRefundedCents.description: The amount of the Tock fee that was returned as a result of the refund.
